content.full_text:
California
Fair Political
Practices Commission
August 1,
1994
Leslie Badua
Capital Representation Group
1127 11th St.,
Suite 1003
Sacramento,
CA
95814
Re:
Your Request For Confirmation
Of Telephone Advice
Our File No.
1-94-241
Dear Ms.
Badua:
This is to confirm telephone advice provided to you regarding
the lobbying disclosure provisions of the Political Reform Act.
(Government Code Sections 81000-91015.)
A lobbyist employer who employs more than one firm must file
only one quarterly Lobbyist Employer Report
(Form 635)
disclosing
payments made to both lobbying firms.
If you have any questions, please contact me at
(916)322-
5662.
Sincerely,
Colleen McGee
Political Reform Consultant
Technical Assistance Division
428 J Street, Suite 800 • P.O. Box 807 • Sacramento CA 95804-0807 • (916)322-5660

sections.conclusion: A lobbyist employer who employs more than one firm must file only one quarterly Lobbyist Employer Report (Form 635) disclosing payments made to both lobbying firms.
sections.question_synthetic: When a lobbyist employer engages more than one lobbying firm, how many Lobbyist Employer Reports (Form 635) must be filed for quarterly disclosures of payments to those firms?
sections.conclusion_synthetic: A lobbyist employer employing multiple lobbying firms need only file a single quarterly Lobbyist Employer Report (Form 635) that discloses payments made to all lobbying firms, rather than separate reports for each firm.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Document lacks formal QUESTION and CONCLUSION section headers but contains clear advice confirming prior telephone guidance. Content clearly identifies the legal question and FPPC's answer/confirmation.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: When a lobbyist employer engages more than one lobbying firm, how many Lobbyist Employer Reports (Form 635) must be filed for quarterly disclosures of payments to those firms?

CONCLUSION: A lobbyist employer who employs more than one firm must file only one quarterly Lobbyist Employer Report (Form 635) disclosing payments made to both lobbying firms.

(Government Code Sections 81000-91015.) A lobbyist employer who employs more than one firm must file only one quarterly Lobbyist Employer Report (Form 635) disclosing payments made to both lobbying firms. If you have any questions, please contact me at (916)322- 5662. Sincerely, Colleen McGee Political Reform Consultant Technical Assistance Division 428 J Street, Suite 800 • P.O. Box 807 • Sacramento CA 95804-0807 • (916)322-5660
embedding.summary: FPPC confirms telephone advice to Leslie Badua regarding lobbying disclosure requirements under the Political Reform Act, specifically clarifying that a lobbyist employer with multiple firms files only one quarterly Form 635 report disclosing all payments.
